disqualification_rule.description: If ANY single metric scores 'bad' (0.0), the stock is immediately rejected regardless of total score. All metrics must score at minimum 'poor' (0.4) for the total score to be evaluated.

eps_growth_yoy.label: EPS Growth YoY
eps_growth_yoy.bad_condition: EPS growth is negative — business is shrinking. Stock rejected.

revenue_growth_yoy.label: Revenue Growth YoY
revenue_growth_yoy.bad_condition: Revenue is declining — demand is collapsing. Stock rejected.

ocf_growth_yoy.label: OCF Growth YoY
ocf_growth_yoy.bad_condition: Operating cash flow is shrinking — earnings quality is deteriorating. Stock rejected.

ocf_to_net_income.label: OCF to Net Income
ocf_to_net_income.bad_condition: Cash flow is significantly below reported profit — earnings may be manipulated. Stock rejected.

operating_margin.label: Operating Margin
operating_margin.bad_condition: Operating margin below 10% — business lacks pricing power or efficiency. Stock rejected.

net_profit_margin.label: Net Profit Margin
net_profit_margin.bad_condition: Net margin below 2% — business is not fundamentally viable at this stage. Stock rejected.

roic.label: ROIC
roic.bad_condition: ROIC below 8% — capital is being deployed unproductively. Stock rejected.

roe.label: ROE
roe.bad_condition: ROE below 8% — shareholders are earning unacceptable returns. Stock rejected.

debt_to_equity.label: Debt to Equity
debt_to_equity.bad_condition: Debt-to-equity above 2.0 — leverage is dangerous and survival risk is elevated. Stock rejected.

current_ratio.label: Current Ratio
current_ratio.bad_condition: Current ratio below 1.2 — company cannot comfortably meet short-term obligations. Stock rejected.

interest_coverage.label: Interest Coverage
interest_coverage.bad_condition: Interest coverage below 2x — earnings cannot safely service debt. Stock rejected.

pe_ratio_relative.label: PE Ratio Relative
pe_ratio_relative.bad_condition: PE ratio more than 1.8x industry average — stock is dangerously overpriced. Stock rejected.

peg_ratio.label: PEG Ratio
peg_ratio.bad_condition: PEG above 2.0 — growth does not justify current valuation. Stock rejected.

ev_ebitda.label: EV / EBITDA
ev_ebitda.bad_condition: EV/EBITDA above 20x — valuation is euphoric and return expectations are unrealistic. Stock rejected.

relative_strength.label: Relative Strength
relative_strength.bad_condition: Stock is underperforming its index — institutional money is not participating. Stock rejected.

analyst_sentiment.label: Analyst Sentiment
analyst_sentiment.bad_condition: More analyst downgrades than upgrades — professional consensus is turning negative. Stock rejected.

volume_trend.label: Volume Trend
volume_trend.bad_condition: Volume is in sharp decline — conviction behind price movement is collapsing. Stock rejected.

evaluation_sequence.step_1: Score every metric individually against its band thresholds
evaluation_sequence.step_2: Check disqualification rule — if ANY metric = bad (0.0), STOP. Stock is REJECTED. Do not compute total score.
evaluation_sequence.step_3: If no metric is bad, compute weighted section scores
evaluation_sequence.step_4: Sum all section scores into total score out of 100
evaluation_sequence.step_5: If total score >= 85, stock PASSES. If total score < 85, stock FAILS.
